name: Dad's Coming
short_description: Chaotic, fast paced and co-op! Tidy up your mess before your dad comes back home! Help Kate and Bob cooperate to get objects across rooms to get rid of the mess in time! Careful not to break anything and beware of your cat Jack, who loves knocking things over!
detailed_description:
After a whole afternoon at home with your sibling, the kitchen’s a mess, your room’s in disarray, you haven't hung the laundry: a normal day. SUDDENLY... you see on that phone notification that your dad will be coming home early - you hear the garage screeching and opening and... RUN!! DAD'S COMING!!

Meet Bob, the goofy, clumsy brother who’s panicking thinking of the horrible things might happen to him if dad finds out they made a mess - like not playing video games for the rest of the night. Terrifying!

Kate, on the other hand, was born for this. She's had years of intensive training: putting everything away and pretending she's asleep as soon as she hears dad in the hallway on the way to her bedroom, never once being spotted! And this time it won't be different.

But be careful! Your adorable cat Jack won't stop knocking things over!

Features

  • Chaotic co-op experience with a friend

  • Fast paced action to tidy up the mess in time

  • Funny and cute characters and animations

  • A mix of cartoony comic-inspired interface and cute pixel art visuals in-game

  • 24 levels across 4 chapters, each one representing a season of the year

Challenges

  • Jack, the mischievous cat is always knocking things over. You can also pet him!

  • Fragile objects and windows. Be careful not to break any!

  • Elevators help you move objects faster between floors!

  • Blizzards that can cause power outages and leave you in the dark!

  • And much more!

Note: At least one controller is required to play local multiplayer.

supported_languages: English, Portuguese - Brazil, Spanish - Latin America, French, Italian, German, Japanese, Simplified Chinese
